c.d: How user-friendly and straightforward the app is for listing and managing items for sale
The commission or fees charged per sale or listing
Availability and flexibility of shipping solutions, including prepaid labels and home pickup
The size and geographic coverage of the app’s buyer audience, e.g., local, national, or global
Measures such as user verification and fraud protection to enable safe transactions
Whether the app is specialized for certain product types like fashion, electronics, collectibles, or general goods
Average ratings and user feedback indicating overall satisfaction and reliability
